events.title: Quran Recitation Night
events.description: An evening of beautiful recitation led by our Huffaz and community students, followed by a short reminder on living with the Quran.

events.title: Hifz Program Orientation
events.description: Meet the Hifz faculty, understand daily routines, and learn how parents can support memorization at home.

events.title: Sisters' Tazkiyah Workshop
events.description: A spiritual development workshop for women focusing on purification of the heart, gratitude, and Qur'anic reflections.

events.title: Short-term Courses Enrollment Day
events.description: Admissions desk open for Pre Alimiyat, Tasheeh & Teaching, and Asasi Deeniyat. On-the-spot counseling available.
